prTitle: feat: assemble NutritionView, MealLogEntryView, and MacroSummaryBar with dashboard integration
prBody:
## Summary

Implements the complete nutrition logging feature for Sprint 3, addressing all feedback from the previous review.

### New Files

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/NutritionViewModel.swift`** — `@Observable @MainActor` view model with SwiftData persistence via `NutritionRepository`. Computes live macro aggregates (`totalKcal`, `totalProteinG`, `totalCarbG`, `totalFatG`) from today's meal logs. Exposes `addEntry(foodItem:servingGrams:mealType:)` and `removeEntry(_:)` actions.

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/NutritionView.swift`** — Main screen listing today's meals grouped by meal type (`MealLogSection`). Shows `MacroSummaryBar` at top, supports swipe-to-delete on individual entries, and opens `MealLogEntryView` as a sheet via the `+` toolbar button.

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/MealLogEntryView.swift`** — Sheet for adding a meal entry. Four-tab interface: Search, Barcode, Templates, Custom. Shows a food-config panel (serving size + meal type picker) once a food is selected.

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/Components/MacroSummaryBar.swift`** — Reusable component with an animated calorie ring and protein/carbs/fat progress bars showing consumed vs target.

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/Views/FoodSearchView.swift`** — Debounced (300 ms) async food search backed by `NutritionRepository.searchFoodItems`.

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/Views/BarcodeScannerView.swift`** — `UIViewControllerRepresentable` wrapping `AVCaptureSession` for EAN-13/8, UPC-A, QR, and Code 128 scanning. Handles camera permission requests gracefully.

- **`FitnessTracker/Services/BarcodeLookupService.swift`** — `actor` that resolves a barcode string to a local `FoodItem` via the repository.

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/Views/CustomFoodFormView.swift`** — Form for defining and persisting a custom `FoodItem` (name + macros per 100 g).

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Nutrition/Views/MealTemplatesView.swift`** — Quick-add list of recently logged and custom foods.

### Modified Files

- **`FitnessTracker/Features/Dashboard/DashboardView.swift`** — Adds `NutritionSummaryWidget`: a tappable card showing live macro progress (via `NutritionViewModel`) that navigates to `NutritionView`.

### Tests

- **`FitnessTrackerTests/NutritionViewModelTests.swift`** — 20 unit tests covering: initial state, `loadTodaysLogs` success/error paths, macro aggregation across multiple logs, `addEntry` (correct macros, new/reuse log), `removeEntry` (decrement totals), `deleteMealLog` (removes from state), and `getOrCreateMealLog` (create/reuse).

### Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Status |
|---|---|
| NutritionView lists today's logged meals with live macro totals in MacroSummaryBar | ✅ Implemented |
| MealLogEntryView allows food selection via search, barcode scan, or custom form | ✅ Implemented |
| Dashboard macro ring/widget updates immediately after a meal log entry is saved | ✅ Implemented via NutritionSummaryWidget |
| Deleting a meal entry removes it from the log and decrements macro totals in real time | ✅ Implemented |

Closes #26
